name: ROBERT HALF INC.
business: Robert Half Inc. provides specialized talent solutions (contract and permanent placement) and business consulting services through Robert Half and Protiviti. It serves clients in finance, accounting, technology, marketing, legal, and administrative fields, as well as consulting in risk, compliance, and internal audit. The company operates in the U.S. and 18 other countries for talent solutions, and in 13 foreign countries for Protiviti.
sellsTo: businesses seeking temporary or permanent staffing
companies needing consulting in risk, compliance, and internal audit
organizations across industry sectors including public sector

exposures.sentence: Robert Half Inc. (the Company ) provides specialized talent solutions and business consulting services through the Robert Half and Protiviti company names.

The Company utilizes a proprietary artificial intelligence ( AI ) engine to match candidates to job listings in order to assist talent solutions professionals with quickly providing skilled and experienced contract talent to clients.

The Company has transitioned a significant number of its employee population to remote work. This transition has also increased the Company s vulnerability to cybersecurity-related risks related to the Company s IT Assets and has exacerbated certain related risks, including risks of phishing and other cybersecurity attacks.
Protiviti continues to invest in and deploy AI-enabled solutions by integrating AI into its existing offerings while aiming to enhance its own AI infrastructure.

The operations of both the talent solutions business and Protiviti include services related to Sarbanes-Oxley, Anti-Money Laundering Act of 2020 reviews, the Bank Secrecy Act of 1970, as amended, and related anti-money laundering regulations, the Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act (the Dodd-Frank Act ), the Foreign Corrupt Practices Act of 1977 and other regulatory compliance services.
